project_profile.risk_profile: high (fork maintenance, security surface, streaming/sync concurrency)
project_profile.justification: Brief is a research+architecture+handoff mission over an existing large TypeScript/Bun monorepo (OpenCode), adding remote API, channel adapters, multi-instance isolation.

4-normalize.note: registers Draft; priorities provisional pending OQ-002

answers.OQ-001: instance = isolated runtime (own config/storage/cache/ports/secrets/logs; may serve multiple projects)
answers.OQ-002: MVP = remote API+SSE, cross-interface sync, Telegram adapter, multi-instance; WhatsApp post-MVP
answers.OQ-003: single operator; apps/channels use operator-issued API keys/tokens
answers.OQ-004: private network only (localhost/LAN/VPN); channels via outbound or webhook relay
